query:
SELECT 
  paymentMethod,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN razorpayPaymentId IS NOT NULL AND razorpayPaymentId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_razorpay_id
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY paymentMethod
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT 
  paymentMethod,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN razorpayPaymentId IS NOT NULL AND razorpayPaymentId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_razorpay_id
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY paymentMethod
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
